name: awesome-claude-skills
description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

name: claude-plugins-official
description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

name: agent-plugins
description: Product on Purpose plugin marketplace registry (Claude Code). Thin host repo: lists plugins via .claude-plugin/marketplace.json; holds no plugin code.

name: claude-skills
description: Cleaned copy of alirezarezvani/claude-skills with 2 stray nested zips removed so the c-level-skills plugin installs in Cowork. Marketplace root at .claude-plugin/marketplace.json

name: cognitum-claude-plugin
description: Cognitum Claude Code plugins (cognitum-mcp cloud + cognitum-seed local). Marketplace at https://cognitum.one/marketplace.json

name: claude-plugin-marketplaces
description: Types for marketplace.json and plugin.json. Generated from https://www.schemastore.org/claude-code-marketplace.json and https://json.schemastore.org/claude-code-plugin-manifest.json.

name: refacil-claude-plugins
description: Marketplace de plugins de Claude Code de Refácil. Este repositorio es un catálogo declarativo (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json) que empaqueta CLIs ya publicados de Refácil como skills instalables en Claude Code, Claude Desktop y Claude Cowork

name: marketplace
description: Public Claude Code plugin marketplace for the Chunky Metro org. See .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.

name: claude-plugin-schemas
description: Strict JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validation pack for Claude Code plugin.json + marketplace.json, ChatGPT Apps SDK, and legacy ai-plugin.json manifests.
